queries.name: da-development
queries.jql: project in ("Digital Assistant") AND type = Incident AND summary ~ "Development" AND Severity in (2, 3, 4) AND source in (Autocut) AND reporter != gear-securitycentral AND status NOT IN (Resolved, "Resolved (RO)", Closed, "Closed (RO)", Archived, Canceled, "Canceled (RO)")

queries.name: da-production
queries.jql: project in ("Digital Assistant") AND type = Incident AND summary ~ "Production" AND source in (Autocut) AND reporter != gear-securitycentral AND status NOT IN (Resolved, "Resolved (RO)", Closed, "Closed (RO)", Archived, Canceled, "Canceled (RO)")

queries.name: cda-production
queries.jql: project in ("Clinical Digital Assistant") AND type = Incident AND summary ~ "Production" AND source in (Autocut) AND reporter != gear-securitycentral AND status NOT IN (Resolved, "Resolved (RO)", Closed, "Closed (RO)", Archived, Canceled, "Canceled (RO)")

queries.name: caa-regional-production
queries.jql: project in ("Clinical Digital Assistant") AND type = Incident AND summary ~ "(IAD OR PHX OR CA-TORONTO-1 OR UK-LONDON-1)" AND summary ~ "Production" AND status in (Open, "In Progress") AND source in (Autocut) AND reporter != gear-securitycentral
